description:
You are the VP of Engineering at TechCorp. Set up a formal release management pipeline in OpenProject (http://localhost:8080, admin / Admin1234!).

Create three new work package statuses: "Ready for QA", "QA Passed", and "Staging Deployed". Configure the workflow for the Member role on Feature type to allow these transitions: "In progress" to "Ready for QA", "Ready for QA" to "QA Passed", "QA Passed" to "Staging Deployed", and "Staging Deployed" to "Closed".

Create a work package list custom field named "Target Release" with options "v2.0.0-alpha", "v2.1.0-beta", and "v3.0.0". Enable it for Feature and Bug types across all three existing projects.

Create a new public project named "Release Coordination" (identifier: release-coordination) with modules: work_package_tracking, wiki, and board_view. Add members alice.johnson, bob.smith, and carol.williams with the Member role.

In Release Coordination, create three Feature work packages: "Release v2.0.0 - E-Commerce Stabilization" assigned to alice.johnson with Target Release "v2.0.0-alpha" and status "In progress"; "Release v2.1.0 - Mobile Banking Security Patch" assigned to carol.williams with Target Release "v2.1.0-beta"; and "Release v3.0.0 - Full Platform Upgrade" assigned to bob.smith with Target Release "v3.0.0".

Create a status-based board named "Release Pipeline" in Release Coordination with columns for New, In progress, Ready for QA, QA Passed, Staging Deployed, and Closed.

Create a wiki page titled "Release Management Process" in Release Coordination documenting the complete status workflow, the three release candidates with their assigned owners, and QA sign-off procedures.

work_packages.subject: Release v2.1.0 - Mobile Banking Security Patch
